Cookies on our website

We use some essential cookies to make this website work.

We'd like to set additional cookies to understand how you use our site so we can improve it for everyone. Also, we'd like to serve you some cookies set by other services to show you relevant content.

View our privacy policy.

Equality, Diversity and Inclusion

Equality, Diversity and Inclusion Champions

Equality, Diversity and Inclusion Champions support our commitment to equality, diversity and inclusion across campus.

Our Equality, Diveristy and Inclusion (EDI) Champions are situated across each of our Schools and Professional Services divisions. The champions disseminate information and best practice, raise awareness of equality and diversity issues, encourage involvement in initiatives and help promote a culture where staff and students are treated fairly and with dignity and respect. You can read more about the role of the EDI Champions [PDF 99KB].

Schools
  • Brighton and Sussex Medical School (BSMS): Suze Cruttwell
  • Education and Social Work: Lizzy McKinney
  • Engineering and Informatics: Elizabeth Rendon-Morales
  • Media, Arts and Humanities: Flora Derounian/Katie Walter/Em Harrison
  • Global Studies: Lara Montesinos Coleman
  • Law, Politics and Sociology:  Liz McDonnell/Bal Sokhi-Bulley
  • Life Sciences: William Hughes
  • Mathematical and Physical Sciences: Cassandra Churchwell
  • Psychology: Matthew Easterbrook/Sophie Forster

  • Univerity of Sussex Business School: Krystallia Moysidou

Professional Services 

  • Estates and Facilities Management: Neil Linstrem
  • Communications, Marketing & Advancement: TBC
  • Finance:Lynne Allen/Edward Dunn
  • Human Resources: Lily Singh
  • IT Services & Sussex Projects:Eleanor Ferguson/Lucy Roth
  • Library: Nadia Pattenden
  • General Counsel, Governance and Compliance: Bigem Aksel
  • University Operations & Strategic Planning: Fray McNulty 
  • Student Experience:Keira Thomas
  • Technical Services: Vicky McDonald  

  • Research and Innovation Services: Lorna Hards /Alice Sambrook-Ricards
